cp-016: The execute route does NOT call validateTopic it only checks topic typeof topic

error.message: Error: Unhandled deep-research checkpoint: cp-016 The execute route does NOT call `validateTopic()` — it only checks `!topic || typeof topic !== "string"`. A topic of 2 characters would pass the execute route's validation (but the plan route would have already rejected it).
error.stack:
Error: Unhandled deep-research checkpoint: cp-016 The execute route does NOT call `validateTopic()` — it only checks `!topic || typeof topic !== "string"`. A topic of 2 characters would pass the execute route's validation (but the plan route would have already rejected it).

cp-018: validateTopic runs inside the SSE stream after the 200 response is already sent

error.message: Error: Unhandled deep-research checkpoint: cp-018 `validateTopic()` runs inside the SSE stream (after the 200 response is already sent), so a 5–500 character violation is emitted as an SSE error event `{ type: "error", error: "Topic must be at least 5 characters long" }`, not as an HTTP 400 response.
error.stack:
Error: Unhandled deep-research checkpoint: cp-018 `validateTopic()` runs inside the SSE stream (after the 200 response is already sent), so a 5–500 character violation is emitted as an SSE error event `{ type: "error", error: "Topic must be at least 5 characters long" }`, not as an HTTP 400 response.
    at /home/user/ScholarSync-/qa/generated/deep-research/spec-014.spec.ts:984:13
